/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/host/linux-x86_64/portable/gcc-i386-musl/13.3.0/bin/i686-linux-g++ -g -nostdlib -static -Wl,--build-id=none -Wl,--no-warn-rwx -Wl,--script=/workspaces/bf/tilck/build/boot/legacy/stage3/linker_script.ld CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/entry.S.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/rm_calls.S.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/common/basic_printk.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/common/gfx.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/common/main_common_logic.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/common/simple_elf_loader.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/common/stdio.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/basic_term.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/intf.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/mm.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/multiboot.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/panic.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/ramdisk.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/realmode_call.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/vbe.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/common/arch/generic_x86/cpu_features.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/common/asserts.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/common/fat32_base.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/common/itoa.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/common/misc.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/common/panic.c.o CMakeFiles/elf_stage3_unstripped.dir/workspaces/bf/tilck/common/string_util.c.o -o elf_stage3_unstripped   -L/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/legacy  -Wl,-rpath,/workspaces/bf/tilck/boot/legacy -lgcc
